title: SourceBans++ telemetry payload, schema 1
description: Canonical wire-format contract for the daily anonymous telemetry ping documented in sbpp/sourcebans-pp#1126. Vendored byte-for-byte from sbpp/cf-analytics (manual sync via `make sync-telemetry-schema`); the panel-side parity tests in `web/tests/integration/TelemetrySchemaParityTest.php` and `web/tests/integration/TelemetryReadmeParityTest.php` lock both extractors and docs against this file.

schema.description: Wire-format version. Pinned at 1 for the lifetime of this lock file; subtractive / repurposing changes bump to schema 2 with a sibling `Schema2` helper. Required.

instance_id.description: 32-char lowercase hex of `random_bytes(16)`. Generated and persisted in `:prefix_settings.telemetry.instance_id` on first ping; cleared on opt-out so an opt-out / opt-in cycle issues a fresh ID. Not a hash of anything — collisions don't matter, attribution does. Required.

version.description: `SB_VERSION` resolved by `Sbpp\Version::resolve()`. Three-tier fallback: `configs/version.json` (release tarball) → `git describe --tags --always` (git checkout) → the `'dev'` sentinel.

git.description: Short git SHA (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`) when available, empty string otherwise. Mirrors `SB_GITREV`'s string surface.

dev.description: True iff `SB_VERSION === Sbpp\Version::DEV_SENTINEL` (the `'dev'` sentinel). Lets the Worker distinguish dev-checkout panels from tarball / tag installs without parsing the version string.

theme.description: `'default'` if the active theme is the panel's shipped default; `'custom'` otherwise. The actual fork theme name is never reported (would leak community names).

php.description: PHP `major.minor` only (e.g. `8.5`). Patch versions intentionally elided — they don't drive any roadmap decision and tighten the fingerprint.

db_engine.description: Lowercase engine name, derived from `SELECT VERSION()` via substring match.

db_version.description: DB `major.minor` parsed from `SELECT VERSION()` (e.g. `10.11`). Patch elided for the same reason as `env.php`.

web_server.description: Substring match against `$_SERVER['SERVER_SOFTWARE']`. The raw header is never forwarded.

admins.description: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM :prefix_admins`. Includes the seeded `CONSOLE` row (`aid = 0`).

bans_active.description: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM :prefix_bans WHERE (ends > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() OR length = 0) AND RemoveType IS NULL`. Mirrors `page.banlist.php`'s active-ban definition.

bans_total.description: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM :prefix_bans` (every row, active + expired + removed).

comms_active.description: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM :prefix_comms WHERE (ends > UNIX_TIMESTAMP() OR length = 0) AND RemoveType IS NULL`.

smtp_configured.description: True iff `:prefix_settings.smtp.host` is non-empty (the panel-controlled SMTP indicator the Settings → Main form drives). The actual host / credentials are never reported.

steam_api_key_set.description: True iff `STEAMAPIKEY` is `define()`d to a non-empty value in `config.php`. The key value itself is never reported.

geoip_present.description: True iff `data/GeoLite2-Country.mmdb` exists and is readable on disk (`MMDB_PATH`). Maxmind data is the panel's only IP-to-country source.
